title: Blaze Rod Vendor
description: Can't find a fortress? Barter with Piglins for a chance to get your hands on some blaze rods  (ノ^o^)ノ
body: ### Unfortunately support for the program I used to create this mod has been terminated, so I will be unable to update/continue working on it. ### If any mod devs would like to take over the project, please contact me on Discord! [![Discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/49eac7d4916630c1ca7a85fe90f40e2363ae80eb.png)](https://discord.gg/W3T34eVScQ) # Blaze Rod Vendor #### Allows Piglins to barter for blaze rods for easire access to potions - ~2% chance for 1-2 blaze rods per gold ingot traded #### Also adds drops for Piglin Brutes to better incentivise taking on a challenge - blaze rod (~1%) & gold nuggets (~24%) ## Compatibility * has only been tested with 1.20.4
